title: Purdue board approves elevating Lilly research center
description:
The university’s board of trustees on Friday approved elevating the Eli Lilly and Company and Purdue University Research Alliance Center and renaming it the Lilly Purdue Innovation Institute.

description:

title: Bears, state move toward formal stadium agreement as work happens behind the scenes
description: Indiana officials say they are confident the Chicago Bears will follow through with plans to move to a stadium in Hammond that will be built with money from local taxpayers and the team, even as specific details continue

title: Beau Bayh defeats Blythe Potter for Democratic secretary of state nomination
description:
Bayh earned 61% of delegate votes, according to convention results. Party officials said 2,269 delegates cast ballots Saturday afternoon, with one blank ballot submitted.

title: Manchester University names new business college dean
description:

title: Noblesville tech services firm Taylored Systems acquired by Kansas company
description:
Noblesville-based technology services company Taylored Systems LLC has been acquired by ISG Technology LLC, a fourth-generation family-owned company based in Overland Park, Kansas.
